title: [architect] Close handoff/Beads/Grit/GitKB integration inspections
objective: Decide: Complete the open follow-up inspections from the state decision: handoff CLI task/checkpoint/done and ledger export, Beads graph/UX ownership, Grit assignment/runtime ownership, and GitKB worker query commands; update the PR-repair state decision with final integration boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Handoff CLI commands for task claim/checkpoint/done, sync/export/import, and ledger JSONL export are mapped with exact current commands.
Beads is classified as canonical state, graph/UX projection, or out-of-scope with evidence.
Grit is classified as assignment runtime, local claim-lock layer, or out-of-scope with evidence.
GitKB worker query commands are documented for repair prompts, including fallback when unavailable.
`.handoff/.idea/pr-repair-state-decision.md` or successor artifact records the final integration boundary decisions.
